message:
Add /release and /release-major slash commands (#23)

* Add /release and /release-major slash commands

Revamp the release workflow to align with tenzir/tenzir:

- Change inputs from explicit version/title/description to bump/intro
- Version now auto-calculated via tenzir-changelog release create
- Title auto-generated as "Tenzir Platform $VERSION"
- Add workflow_call support for reusable workflow
- Add Python and uv setup steps for tenzir-changelog
- Add unreleased entries check before release creation

Add /release-major as a separate workflow for major releases to ensure
breaking changes get appropriate review and confirmation.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Address PR review comments for release workflow

- Remove overly strict unreleased entries check (tenzir-changelog will
  fail naturally if nothing to release)
- Add wait for auto-sync workflow before syncing to tenzir/platform
- Use proper workflow name "Public - Sync"
- Fetch and reset to origin/main before syncing to handle race condition

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [tool.poetry]
 name = "tenzir-platform"
-version = "0.0.0" # The actual version is set in the CLI during a release
+version = "1.25.1"
 description = "Tenzir CLI"
 license = "BSD-3-Clause"
 authors = ["Tenzir <engineering@tenzir.com>"]
